title: Senior Doctor - Medtronic India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Medtronic India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Medtronic India in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Medtronic India:
Medtronic India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medtronic India!
